placeholders.description: Capture the StudioLens report overview using anonymized sample data. Include the full Power BI report canvas with agent performance summary metrics and visible page navigation; exclude browser chrome, environment names, transcripts, and personal data.
placeholders.proposedAlt: StudioLens agent performance overview with anonymized sample data.

placeholders.description: Capture the ValueLens Fabric Extended template's Edit Parameters dialog using synthetic values. Show Enable_Dataverse set to Include and the optional consumption controls; exclude real endpoints, lakehouse names, tenant identifiers, and credentials.
placeholders.proposedAlt: ValueLens Fabric Extended parameters with Copilot Studio data enabled.

placeholders.description: Capture the Power Platform Admin Center credit-consumption export setup used by the ValueLens Fabric Extended path. Show the relevant export controls and reporting period; exclude tenant names, environment names, billing identifiers, and customer data.
placeholders.proposedAlt: Copilot Studio credit-consumption export controls for ValueLens Fabric Extended.

placeholders.description: Capture the Fabric Lakehouse explorer after the three required ValueLens core notebooks have run. Show dbo.Copilot_Interactions_Parsed, dbo.copilot_licensed_users, and dbo.copilot_org_data; exclude workspace names, lakehouse names, tenant identifiers, and customer data.
placeholders.proposedAlt: Fabric Lakehouse with the three required ValueLens core tables.

placeholders.description: Capture the Entra app registration API permissions page for the ValueLens Fabric path. Show the required Microsoft Graph application permissions with admin consent; exclude application names, tenant identifiers, client identifiers, and credentials.
placeholders.proposedAlt: Required Microsoft Graph application permissions for ValueLens Fabric ingestion.

placeholders.description: Capture the ValueLens Fabric template's Edit Parameters dialog using synthetic values. Include Fabric SQL Endpoint, Lakehouse Name, and the Enable_* list parameters; exclude real endpoints, workspace names, tenant identifiers, and credentials.
placeholders.proposedAlt: ValueLens Fabric template parameters with synthetic Lakehouse values.

placeholders.description: Capture the Fabric pipeline or schedule view containing the three required ValueLens core notebooks. Show the audit, licensed-users, and org-data activities and their scheduling controls; exclude workspace names, notebook identifiers, tenant identifiers, and run data.
placeholders.proposedAlt: Fabric pipeline scheduling the three required ValueLens core notebooks.

placeholders.description: Capture the ValueLens report with the User Activation page selected, using anonymized sample data. Include the full Power BI report canvas, visible page navigation, and headline activation metrics; exclude browser chrome, tenant names, and personal data.
placeholders.proposedAlt: ValueLens User Activation report page with anonymized sample data.
